source.superseded_gap_inventory_payload_schema_: historical_field_name_only; values are logical urn:odeya:event-payload type IDs, not JSON Schema resource IDs

identity_semantics.branch_pointer_semantics: JSON Pointer into the exact raw ResearchEvent 0.7.0 schema resource bound by ID, SHA-256, and byte count. It is not a standalone payload-schema resource and cannot be resolved through a latest alias.

required_schema_resource_candidates.affected_first_slice_area: local work-lease attempt and assignment payload references

compatibility_findings.current_consumer_contract: work.lease_released requires reservation_claim_state=unclaimed and a null reservation_claim_event_ref
compatibility_findings.required_first_slice_contract: after attempt.start claims the reservation, lease release retains claimed plus the exact claim event and does not mutate ResourceLedger; settlement remains separate
compatibility_findings.required_action: reissue ResearchEvent and its EventContractRecord under PRQ-009 with exact release/claim/settlement vectors

required_schema_resource_candidates.remaining_disposition: schema resource absence is removed; canonical profile, record identity, assignment cohort, immutable registry membership, reducer evidence, and activation remain blocking
